1.description: (Color online) Group Acceptance Rates Without an Affirmative Action Policy (Gray, Solid) and with a Nonintersectional Policy Achieving a Reductive Representative Outcome (Green, Checkered) Note. Black dashed line shows the rate achieving a representative outcome.

2.description: (Color online) Nonintersectional Affirmative Action Policy That Achieves Proportional Representation Along the Dimensions of Race and Gender but Reduces the Representation of Black Men
